# launchdarkly_ai_config (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly AI Config data source.

This data source allows you to retrieve AI Config information from your LaunchDarkly organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_ai_config" "example" {
  project_key = "example-project"
  key         = "example-ai-config"
}

output "ai_config_details" {
  value = {
    name        = data.launchdarkly_ai_config.example.name
    description = data.launchdarkly_ai_config.example.description
    mode        = data.launchdarkly_ai_config.example.mode
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The unique key that references the AI Config.
- `project_key` (String) The AI Config's project key.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the AI Config.
- `evaluation_metric_key` (String) The evaluation metric key for this AI Config.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_inverted` (Boolean) Whether the evaluation metric is inverted, meaning a lower value is better if set as true.
- `maintainer_id` (String) The LaunchDarkly member ID of the member who will maintain the AI Config. If not set, the API will automatically apply the member associated with your Terraform API key or the most recently-set maintainer.
- `maintainer_team_key` (String) The key of the team that will maintain the AI Config.
- `mode` (String) The mode for the AI Config. Available choices are `agent`, `completion`, and `judge`. Defaults to `completion`.
- `name` (String) The human-friendly name for the AI Config.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with your resource.
- `version` (Number) The version of the AI Config.
